title: MBA (Logistics and Supply Chain Management)
content: The MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management specialization prepares strategic leaders for designing, optimizing, and transforming resilient global supply chain networks. This program offers an advanced analytical perspective on strategic procurement, sophisticated inventory optimization, integrated warehousing solutions, multi-modal transportation networks, and distribution strategies across complex value chains. Students will gain expertise in leveraging advanced analytics, disruptive digital technologies, and sustainable practices to architect and manage high-performing supply chains. The curriculum addresses complex strategic challenges such as global sourcing risks, network optimization, and last-mile efficiency at scale. Graduates will be empowered to lead end-to-end supply chain transformations, enhance operational excellence, and strategically drive competitive advantage across diverse industries from manufacturing to e-commerce. Course Category | Credits | Common Core | 68 | Specialisation Core | 33 | Specialisation Elective | 18 | VAD | 8 | AEC | 12 | Community Service Project | 2 | Internship | 5 | Industrial Research Project | 14 | Total | 160 | Bachelor Degree with Minimum 50% aggregate marks Students having MAT / XAT / CMAT / NMAT / GMAT/ CUET Score will be given preference in merit 01 Synthesise advanced management theories and practices to craft strategic solutions for complex business challenges. 02 Evaluate organisational performance and market dynamics using advanced analytical frameworks for robust, data-driven strategic decision-making. 03 Integrate principles of business ethics, corporate governance, and sustainability into strategic decision-making and organisational practices. 04 Execute and manage trans-disciplinary solutions with proficiency, skilfully leveraging advanced digital tools and techniques for organisational transformation and competitive advantage. 05 Facilitate diverse teams and navigate complex collaborative environments with agility, adeptly utilising communication platforms and tools to achieve strategic organisational objectives. 06 Innovate and validate scalable entrepreneurial ventures, integrating sustainable business models to generate significant societal and economic value. 07 Sustain value-based leadership and catalyse continuous professional development for enduring organisational excellence and transformative personal growth. 01 Lead and strategically optimize complex global supply chain networks by applying advanced analytical techniques and integrated systems thinking to achieve operational excellence and competitive advantage, preparing for roles in supply chain strategy development, logistics network design, or operations optimization. 02 Drive digital transformation and resilience within supply chain operations by leveraging emerging technologies and data analytics to enhance visibility, mitigate risks, and ensure business continuity, suitable for positions in supply chain analytics, logistics technology implementation, or risk management. 03 Champion ethical sourcing and sustainable logistics practices, contributing to responsible value creation that balances economic objectives with environmental and social well-being, often seen in sustainable supply chain management or corporate responsibility roles within the industry. 01 Optimize and lead complex global supply chain networks, applying advanced analytical techniques and integrated systems thinking to achieve operational excellence, competitive advantage, and robust resilience, preparing for roles in supply chain strategy development, logistics network design, or operations optimization. 02 Transform operations and integrate ethical sourcing and sustainable logistics practices, leveraging emerging technologies and data analytics to enhance visibility, mitigate risks, and ensure responsible value creation across the value chain. 01 Advanced Business Acumen & Strategic Thinking: Acquire in-depth knowledge of functional business areas and integrate interdisciplinary concepts to analyze complex organizational challenges and formulate strategic solutions in a dynamic global context. 02 Critical Analysis & Decision Making: Critically analyze complex business problems, synthesize information from various sources, and apply advanced analytical frameworks and quantitative techniques to make robust and evidence-based strategic decisions. 03 Global & Cross-Cultural Competence: Understand the complexities of global business environments, cultural nuances, and their impact on international operations, demonstrating the ability to manage diverse teams and foster inclusive practices. 04 Leadership & Managerial Effectiveness: Demonstrate strong leadership qualities, including vision, motivation, conflict resolution, and change management, to inspire and guide teams towards achieving organizational objectives in diverse settings. 05 Ethical Governance & Sustainability: Apply principles of ethical leadership, corporate governance, and sustainable development in business practices, recognizing and addressing societal and environmental impacts of strategic decisions. 06 Innovation & Entrepreneurship: Foster an innovative mindset, identify entrepreneurial opportunities, and demonstrate the ability to develop and implement new ventures or intrapreneurial initiatives within existing organizations. 07 Research & Consultancy Skills: Conduct independent research using appropriate methodologies, analyze complex data, and effectively communicate findings to provide insightful recommendations for real-world business problems, potentially in a consulting capacity. 08 Professional Communication & Networking: Communicate highly complex business concepts and strategic proposals effectively to senior management, stakeholders, and the broader professional community, while also building and leveraging professional networks.
